rationale: Improvement to stop unnecessary heartbeats against arbiters; no specific SDAM spec rule violated.
GSSAPI buffer sizing for large AD group memberships; Windows-specific implementation detail, not a GSSAPI spec rule.
RawBsonArray.IsReadOnly returns wrong value; internal C# API bug, no BSON spec rule involved.
ASP.NET OData $select and DateTime query failures; ORM/LINQ mapping issue, not a spec area.
LINQ queries not supported against MongoCollection<BsonDocument>; LINQ feature gap, not a driver spec.
Authentication attempts against arbiters flood logs; no spec rule says drivers must not authenticate against arbiters.
BsonDocumentWrapper.AsBsonDocument throws despite BsonType==Document; internal C# API contract bug, not BSON spec.
LazyBsonDocument uses default 4MB max document size instead of server setting; internal config bug.
Connection failures after large reads in production; networking/connectivity issue with no specific spec rule.
MongoServer.BuildInfo is null before first command; internal timing/initialization issue, not spec-covered.
Optimization to reduce numberToReturn on OP_GET_MORE when limit is known; performance improvement, not a spec violation.
Command rerouting to primary fails when topology type is Unknown in Automatic mode; internal state-machine bug.
Auth spec requires CANONICALIZE_HOST_NAME mechanism property for GSSAPI; driver lacks this required option.
GridFS unique index incompatibility with sharding; server-side constraint, not a GridFS spec driver behavior rule.
Empty string dictionary key causes IndexOutOfRangeException in BsonWriter; C# serializer crash, not a BSON spec rule.
GSSAPI cross-realm authentication support; Improvement adding a feature, no existing spec rule violated.
Add support for parallelCollectionScan command; feature addition, not a spec conformance bug.
LINQ downcasting support request; LINQ feature gap, not a driver spec area.
LINQ queries fail for Int16 fields; LINQ type-mapping bug, not a MongoDB driver spec.
IP endpoint cached after DNS resolution preventing reconnect on IP change; Related link to JAVA-310 is parallel, not a cross-driver inconsistency filing.
Add support for new GeoNear options (includeLocs, uniqueDocs, $maxTimeMS); feature addition, not spec conformance.
Server selection spec defines which commands can run on secondary; 'text' command missing from whitelist is a spec violation.
Request to update fsync write concern flag documentation; docs improvement, not a driver behavior bug.
GridFS Delete/Move use wrong read preference when file was read from secondary; internal GridFS implementation bug.
SetSkip/SetLimit accept Int32 instead of Int64; API ergonomics improvement, not a spec rule.
Duplicate of CSHARP-893; empty string key causes IndexOutOfRange in BsonWriter; C# serializer crash.
Query with ulong _id returns no results for some values due to signed/unsigned type mapping; C#-specific type issue.
BSON spec prohibits null characters in element names; driver throws unhelpful ArgumentException instead of BsonSerializationException.
Exhaust query flag unsupported but silently corrupts connection; internal limitation, not a spec rule.
InsertBatch crashes with 10k documents on 2.6 when emulating via write commands; internal batch-splitting bug.
Repository reorganization; build/packaging change with no behavior impact.
Remove strong naming from assemblies; build/packaging concern, no spec involvement.
Raise minimum .NET Framework version to 4; build/platform requirement change, no spec involvement.
Remove partially trusted callers (AllowPartiallyTrustedCallers) support; build/security attribute, no spec involvement.
Server selection spec requires parallelCollectionScan on secondary whitelist; omission means commands incorrectly routed.
Remove redundant Create methods and change null-handling semantics; internal API design cleanup.
BsonDocument Add methods should throw ArgumentNullException for C# null; internal C# API behavior change.
_id assignment regression when nominal type is interface; C# type system behavior, no specific spec rule for interface nominal types.
Design question on serializing C# null BsonValues as {_csharpnull:true}; C#-specific serialization design, not BSON spec.
BsonObjectId null serialized as {_csharpnull:true} breaks LINQ null queries; C#-specific null representation design issue.
Aggregate with $out must go to primary per spec; driver sends it to secondary because it's on the secondary whitelist unconditionally.
$maxDistance must be inside $near for GeoJSON per 2.6 spec change; driver places it outside, violating the spec.
Write concern spec: wnote/jnote fields are warnings on pre-2.6; driver treats them as errors, deviating from spec.
Redesign IBsonSerializer interface with context parameter; internal API refactor, no spec involvement.
StackOverflowException deserializing Dictionary<string, Interface>; C# type resolution crash, no spec involvement.
Reconsider Dynamic DictionaryRepresentation default; internal C# serialization design decision, not spec-covered.
IndexOptions builder missing 'bits' option for 2d indexes; feature gap, not a spec conformance violation.
BitmapSerializer fails to round-trip some pixel formats; platform-specific serialization issue, not a BSON spec.
ObjectId DateTime overload doesn't validate 32-bit timestamp range; framed as 'consider throwing', not a confirmed spec violation.
MongoServer.GetDatabase returns new instance each call despite docs saying otherwise; documentation/API contract issue.
